name: Colliers CRE Data & Analytics API
what_it_does: Colliers REST APIs for commercial real estate market data and analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage CRE market statistics and vacancy rate data retrieval for market analysis, handle property listing and availability data access for leasing and investment, access transaction comparable and investment sale data for valuation analytics, retrieve construction activity and new supply pipeline data for market forecasting, manage portfolio analytics and asset performance data for investors, handle occupier and tenant demand tracking for leasing strategy, access sector-specific market reports and research data, retrieve capital markets and investment activity data for CRE finance, manage corporate real estate portfolio benchmarking data, and integrate CRE market intelligence with investment management and portfolio analytics platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving market statistics from CRE portfolio strategy agents
Analyzing investment transactions from CRE acquisition agents
Monitoring tenant demand from leasing analytics agents
Benchmarking portfolio performance from asset management agents
not_for: Residential real estate without commercial property market focus
Sub-institutional CRE without enterprise market intelligence needs
Markets without Colliers data coverage (varies by region)
best_when: An institutional CRE investor or corporate occupier using Colliers market intelligence wants AI agents to automate market trend analysis, investment analytics, leasing strategy, and portfolio benchmarking.
avoid_when: LICENSING RISK: Colliers market research and data is proprietary — automated redistribution without licensing authorization violates data agreements. CRE market data methodology varies by provider; Colliers statistics should not be directly compared with CoStar or CBRE without methodology alignment.

auth.notes: Colliers data API uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. Relationship-gated access. No formal public API program. Data delivery via data platform, direct API, or bulk download. No webhooks. Toronto, Ontario HQ. Public (CIGI NASDAQ/TSX). Global CRE services firm. Technology investment through Anterra Capital.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — client relationship required
pricing.paid_tiers: Data licensing as part of advisory services or standalone data agreement
pricing.notes: Toronto, Ontario. Founded 1972. Public (CIGI NASDAQ/TSX). $4.5B+ annual revenue. Global CRE services firm in 65+ countries. CRE market data from 2,000+ research professionals. Technology focus with investments in proptech. Competes with CBRE and JLL for global CRE services.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; client-negotiated

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSING RISK: Colliers research data redistribution requires licensing authorization; validate data use rights before building downstream data products
No formal API program — Colliers data API is relationship-gated without public developer documentation; expect direct client relationship requirement
Global coverage variability — Colliers market data coverage depth varies significantly by country and submarket; verify coverage for your target markets
Data vintage — CRE statistics published quarterly or annually; real-time market data unavailable; use appropriate data recency for analytics
Cross-provider methodology — Colliers and CoStar/CBRE use different market area and building class definitions; direct comparison requires methodology alignment
Technology investment focus — Colliers has invested in proptech (Anterra Capital); technology partnerships may affect API ecosystem; verify current data product strategy
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE market data and research. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Commercial property market data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE market data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Commercial property data.
